Hi

My name is Omar Almasry. I'm a digital designer working with agencies and in-house marketing teams to design and build digital experiences that work for everyone.

Companies I've worked with

Featured Projects

Interesting case studies for some projects I worked on.

View case study: Socialsuite
  • Branding
  • Web Design / Dev

Socialsuite

Brand identity and website design for a global ESG platform serving 150+ organizations — including YMCA, Big Brothers Big Sisters, and publicly traded companies on NASDAQ and NYSE.

View case study
View case study: Dubai Holding
  • Web Design / Dev
  • Accessibility

Dubai Holding

Enterprise Webflow partner for Dubai Holding, migrating and building websites across their portfolio — from destination sites to retail malls — with a focus on accessibility, bilingual support, and SEO preservation.

View case study
View case study: ColorCoded Labs
  • Web Design / Dev

ColorCoded Labs

A tech boot camp that prepares motivated individuals with the skills they need for high-demand technology careers.

View case study
View case study: Pixlee TurnTo
  • Web Design / Dev

Pixlee TurnTo

Pixlee TurnTo, a leader in Social User-Generated Content (UGC), Ratings & Reviews, and Influencer Marketing tools, needed a complete migration of their high-traffic blog to Webflow to enhance performance and empower their marketing team. Following the successful migration, Pixlee TurnTo was acquired by Emplifi, a global leader in customer experience solutions.

View case study
View case study: Eon Aligner
  • Web Development

Eon Aligner

Eon Aligner is a dental brand specializing in clear-aligner treatment. I built a React-based doctor locator with interactive Google Maps integration, country/city filtering, and an Airtable backend that lets the marketing team manage clinic listings without developer involvement.

View case study

What My Clients Say

Kind words from lovely people.

Haley Fraser Director of Marketing, Brand and Content

Omar was terrific to work with. He quickly and skillfully helped re-platform our entire blog to Webflow within our timeline and budget. Omar went above and beyond to help us with our project – we couldn't be more thankful!

Eleanor Carter Senior Content Strategist

It was fantastic to work with Omar - from start to finish he was a delight to work with! Omar went above and beyond to help us deliver our project on time - going above and beyond the original scope of work to help us create an incredible website. His training on the CMS was fantastic, and I recommend Omar to anyone looking for assistance with a Webflow site!

Victoria Hogg Marketing Director

I've worked with Omar on multiple content projects for different companies - ranging from best-in-class tech brands to small 1-man businesses - and I can safely say Omar is the most creative, engaging, reliable, and awesome content partner I've ever worked with.

Caitlin Riesbeck Art Director

Our boutique marketing agency has had the opportunity to work with Omar as a web designer and developer on multiple projects and he has truly brought value to every single one. His work is fantastic, our clients are thrilled, and beyond that we have found him to be a genuine joy to work with. Hands down cannot recommend Omar enough.

Miia Hiltunen Chief Growth Officer

For this job since the very start before even choosing Omar for it, I had such a good feeling about him. I mean go check out his page with his intro video, if your not convinced by his expertise then I'm speechless! So professional, and in general I loved working with him. Can't wait for our future collabs!
